title: Survival Resurrected
description: A mod that I envisioned would make the survival gameplay experience entertaining in its own fashion.
body:
This mod intends to make the survival gameplay experience more entertaining than the vanilla experience by:

-  Completely Overhauling Aspects of the Game such as the Health and Hunger System
 
-  Tweaks to Existing Items such as The Shield Which Allows Melee Pushback for Close-Combat  Encouragment
  
-  Balances to Vanilla Crafting Recipes and the Enchantment Table 

As Well as Adding **New Items**, **Gadgets**, **Enemies** Including Re-designs of Existing Items In The Game Listed As Follows:

- Craftable **Runes** that have their own individual powers in restoring the player's ability to return to combat quickly

- Crazy Amount of Craftable Gadgets That Certainly Make Your Survival World Replayable By a Whole Lot More Than Without Them


- A New Progression/Upgrade System for Enchantments Books in the anvil since they are now re-usable!

- Find Enchanted Bundles In Place of Enchantment Books Within Generated Structures To Unveil An Enchantment Book To Begin Upgrading In The Anvil

- A new **Chalice-Challenge System** Through The Use of Craftable Chalices That Encourage the Player to Fight Against Enemies that during its Duration makes spawned enemies tougher for a chance of obtaining **Enchant-Upgrading Items** 

- A New Chalice Reward Material Called **Dreadmire** That Is Used to Create Tools/Armor With Peculiar Perks for Every Tool and Armor Piece

- More Than 8 New Tough Enemies That Each Have Unique Combat Behavior!

And So Much More!

This Mod Is A Work-In-Progress Since I intend to add more content to make the survival experience more optimal and refreshing!

Credit To Count Grimhart For Art Used For The Chalice Items!

=== REQUIRES GECKOLIB DEPENDENCY TO WORK! ===
